Joshua Weems is the #427 ranked MMA fighter in the North America region. Weems is also ranked in 3 North America sub-regions (US Southeast, US West, Nevada). He is only ranked in regions where he has fought at least 2 times out of his last 6 MMA bouts.

While only Featherweight is shown below, Weems is ranked at Featherweight and Bantamweight in each region, since he fought at least once in each weight class in his last 2 fights.
